"use client";

import { createAgentFrameSpinner } from "@/lib/next-spinners/agent-frame-spinner";

const FRAMES = [
  "⠀",
  "⠂",
  "⠌",
  "⡑",
  "⢕",
  "⢝",
  "⣫",
  "⣟",
  "⣿",
  "⣟",
  "⣫",
  "⢝",
  "⢕",
  "⡑",
  "⠌",
  "⠂",
  "⠀",
] as const;

export const BreatheSpinner = createAgentFrameSpinner(FRAMES, 100, "BreatheSpinner");
